description_long: This cabinetry unit is a modern kitchen setup featuring a combination of base and wall cabinets, integrated appliances, and open shelving. The lower section includes a stainless steel sink with a faucet, a built-in oven, and a cooktop, all set into a white countertop. The cabinetry is finished in a mix of wood grain and matte white, with sleek bar pulls on the drawers and doors. The upper section has closed cabinets, open shelves displaying jars and dishes, and a dark backsplash that contrasts with the lighter surfaces. Decorative items, such as a small potted plant and spice jars, add a touch of realism. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for urban apartments or small kitchens.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry unit with wood and white finishes, integrated appliances, and open shelving. Features include a sink, oven, cooktop, and sleek bar handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full kitchen setup with sink, oven, cooktop, upper and lower cabinets, open shelves, and visible accessories.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinetry and the protrusion of the countertop and upper cabinets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat back panel with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabinetry's profile, including the thickness of the countertop and the arrangement of the upper and lower cabinets.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen base and wall cabinet set
attribute_door_configuration: combination of double door, single door, and open shelf
